name: mirage
description: Operate Mirage video projects from Codex with project sync, production actions, and craft skills.

interface.longDescription: Use Mirage from Codex to create and operate AI video projects: concepts, scripts, style, cast and environment references, storyboards, video generation, audio, render prep, local workbench sync, and production issue capture.
